collision energy: using collision-induced dissociation (CID) at 32% normalized collision energy
enrichment method: MHC-I peptide complexes were immunoaffinity purified
fragmentation method: using collision-induced dissociation (CID) at 32% normalized collision energy
instrument: using a hybrid Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
ionization type: on the nano electrospray ionization (NSI) EASY-Spray source
